story.description: A clip of conservation, restoration, habitats, reforestation, or protected nature: men engaged in community tree planting outdoors
story.hook: Start with the root network; it explains the next move
story.lead: These trees will outlive us. Watch the roots dig in deep. That’s why every sapling grows stronger than the last—because the soil remembers what we plant. How many more can we tuck in today?
